channel.title: Workflow on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Workflow on jamesm.blog

item.title: My AI-Augmented Design Workflow: A 10-Minute Loop From Discussion to Documented Decision
item.description: How a combination of Cursor in the IDE, Claude Code and Codex in the terminal, and ChatGPT for general questions, collapsed my discuss-design-document loop to under ten minutes - backed by transcribed meetings checked into GitHub and a daily cross-check between code and design.

item.title: Hardware Sequencers in 2026: When Physical Beats Software
item.description: In an era of AI-generated melodies and infinite DAW power, the physical hardware sequencer has transitioned from a niche tool to a vital mental anchor for the modern producer.
